rationale: Elec. Code §274.028 governs commission retention by associations publishing constitutional amendment notices. It is wholly unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: If the secretary of state contracts with a statewide association for publication of the notice of a proposed constitutional amendment, the contract must provide that the association retain a commission out of the amount paid by the state under the contract.
_note: No relationship between the cited rule and the proposed change.
